[[0 ABY/Legends|0]]–[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]<ref name="Han Solo Rescue">''[[Han Solo's Rescue Mission]]'' depicts [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] as a "hero of the Rebel Alliance", which puts it before the reformation into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], and thus before Solo's imprisonment in carbonite in {{Film|V}}, which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref>

'''''Han Solo's Rescue Mission''''' is a young children's book telling a story about [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] rescuing a group of Ithorians. It was written by [[John Whitman]] and illustrated by [[Kilian Plunkett]] and published in [[March]] [[1998]].

As a [[Cruise Along Books|Cruise Along Book]], the book came packaged with a Micro Machines X-Ray Fleet miniature [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].

==Plot summary==
The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] volunteered for a daring mission as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was preparing to [[Skirmish at Ithor|attack]] the [[Planet/Legends|plant]] [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. A group of [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]] were being transported by Han and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]]. After rescuing the Ithorians, the Imperial forces arrive and several [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] attack the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''. Solo was able to outmaneuver them, but the [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser]] bolts damaged the ship's computer and they flew into an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]]. They escaped, but nearly got eaten by three [[Exogorth/Legends|space slugs]], although Solo was able to fly his ship past them. When they finally arrived at Bimmisaari, the landing gear jammed. Solo again maneuvered his ship, missing a large [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], so it was able to hit the landing pad, stopping its descent.

==Continuity==
Continuity-wise, the events depicted in the novel ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'' involving the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] character [[Tendau Nandon]] may help to reconcile events later depicted in this particular Fun Works storybook.
